questions.question: What is the main purpose of the Gauss-Jordan method?
keyPoints: Transforming a matrix into reduced row echelon form

questions.question: What is the difference between Gaussian elimination and the Gauss-Jordan method?
keyPoints: Gaussian elimination transforms a matrix into upper triangular form
The Gauss-Jordan method transforms a matrix into reduced row echelon form

questions.question: What is the purpose of pivoting in the Gauss-Jordan method?
What is the relationship between the Gauss-Jordan method and matrix inversion?
keyPoints: The Gauss-Jordan method can be used to find the inverse of a matrix

questions.question: What is the advantage of using the Gauss-Jordan method over other methods?
Explain the Gauss-Jordan method for solving systems of linear equations.
keyPoints: Transforming a matrix into reduced row echelon form
Using pivoting to avoid division by zero

questions.question: Compare and contrast the Gauss-Jordan method with other methods for solving systems of linear equations.
Explain the application of the Gauss-Jordan method in computer science.
